description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy with ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04 jobs that install dependencies, set up Xvfb, cache pyenv, install Python 3.9.1, checkout the repository, cache third-party packages, build BioDynaMo with Ninja, run unit tests, perform style guide checks, and notify Slack on success, failure, or cancellation.
